items.reasoning: Sustain through Arc Lightning + Crystal Nova magic spam. Both heroes harass constantly.
Builds into Hood later; early armor for mixed damage lane.
2x branches for +2 all stats; cheap and efficient for offlane.
Burst mana for Anchor Smash when contesting CS or trading with Zeus.
Kraken Shell + Hood = 60%+ magic resistance. Arc Lightning deals negligible damage.
Dodge Crystal Nova slow zone and position for Anchor Smash last hits.
Arc Lightning + Crystal Nova spam = 8+ charges per minute. Best investment.
Blink + Ravage catches Zeus and CM who position in the backline. 2.8s stun AoE.
Hood upgrade; 400 magic damage barrier for entire team. Negates Thundergod's Wrath.
Double Ravage = 5.6s AoE stun. Zeus and CM cannot survive two full Ravage combos.
Anchor Smash upgrade with additional utility. Tide scales well with stats.
AoE slow + armor. Active hits Freezing Field channeling CM for interrupt setup.
Reflects Zeus Lightning Bolt back on him. Dispels ally targeted by Frostbite.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Kraken Shell's damage block plus Hood makes Tide nearly immune to magic damage. Rush Blink for game-changing Ravage initiations on the squishy backline. Pipe shields the entire team from Thundergod's Wrath global damage. Double Ravage with Refresher ends teamfights instantly.
